title: Mossel Bay firefighters compete for Toughest Firefighter Alive
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Firefighters from across...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Firefighters from across southern Africa, including Mossel Bay, are competing in the 10th Toughest Firefighter Alive (TFA) Challenge in the hopes of securing the coveted title of Toughest Firefighter.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Firefighters from across southern Africa, including Mossel Bay, are competing in the 10th Toughest Firefighter Alive (TFA) Challenge in the hopes of securing the coveted title of Toughest Firefighter."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The competition began at the Garden Route Mall in George on Thursday 9 October and will conclude today, 11 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Competitors participating are from South Africa, Botswana and Namibia.","html":"Competitors participating are from South Africa, Botswana and Namibia."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two male teams and one women's team are representing Mossel Bay at this year's competition, as well as three individual competitors: Nadia Jacobus-Julies, Thandisizwe Makrola and Siphokazi Yabo.","html":"Two male teams and one women's team are representing Mossel Bay at this year's competition, as well as three individual competitors: Nadia Jacobus-Julies, Thandisizwe Makrola and Siphokazi Yabo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The participants are firefighters of the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services.","html":"The participants are firefighters of the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During last year's TFA Challenge, Makrola was named the 3rd Best Male (Toughest Firefighter Alive Overall) as well as 1st Best Male in his age category of 35 to 39.","html":"During last year's TFA Challenge, Makrola was named the 3rd Best Male (Toughest Firefighter Alive Overall) as well as 1st Best Male in his age category of 35 to 39."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This year, he hopes to secure the top spot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay previously hosted the TFA in 2022, 2023 and 2024.","html":"Mossel Bay previously hosted the TFA in 2022, 2023 and 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The TFA challenge includes high-intensity obstacle courses, rescue simulations, the Mini Toughest Firefighter Alive Challenge and the TFA-Dräger Youth Challenge, all designed to test physical and mental endurance while fostering camaraderie among fire services.","html":"The TFA challenge includes high-intensity obstacle courses, rescue simulations, the Mini Toughest Firefighter Alive Challenge and the TFA-Dräger Youth Challenge, all designed to test physical and mental endurance while fostering camaraderie among fire services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Crew members of the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services competing in the TFA Challenge. Photo: Mossel Bay Municipality","html":"Crew members of the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services competing in the TFA Challenge. Photo: Mossel Bay Municipality"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
